category: investigation
dataset: guardian_xql_lab
ecosystem: xsiam

- json_extract_scalar_array

---
# Find rows where an adjacent scalar column is NOT a member of an array column

**Dataset**: `guardian_xql_lab` (composite/array lookup lab)

To test a per-row scalar against that row's own array, use `array_any(arr, "@element" = <scalar_col>)` — the right side of `"@element" = ...` can be another column, giving a boolean membership test. Filtering for `= false` surfaces the gaps: here, accounts whose `required_role` is absent from their granted `roles` array (a least-privilege / access-review check).

```sql
dataset = guardian_xql_lab
| alter roles = json_extract_scalar_array(roles_json, "$")
| alter has_required = array_any(roles, "@element" = required_role)
| filter has_required = false
| fields username, host, required_role, roles_json
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant; measured cost ~0.0003 CU against a 10-row lookup (data scanned, not query complexity, drives CU)._
